subject: Sildar escort payment
fact: Sildar offered 50 gold pieces to be escorted to Neverwinter or Phandalin.
source_quote: offered 50 gold pieces to be escorted to Neverwinter/Phandalin

subject: Zenvon damage from wolf
fact: A wolf bit Zenvon for 5 points of damage.
source_quote: A wolf bit Zenvon for 5 points of damage

subject: Zenvon healing
fact: Sister Maela cast Cure Wounds, healing Zenvon to full 16 HP including temp HP.
source_quote: healing Zenvon to full (16 HP including temp HP)

subject: Veyra damage to Klarg
fact: Veyra used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg.
source_quote: Veyra: Used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg

subject: Goblin killed by firebolt
fact: Veyra killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt for 7 points of damage.

subject: Zenvon damage to Klarg
fact: Zenvon landed the killing blow on Klarg for 8 points of damage.
source_quote: for 8 points of damage (Klarg had 5 HP remaining)

subject: Klarg remaining HP
fact: Klarg had 5 HP remaining before being killed.

subject: loot copper pieces
fact: The party found 1,700 copper pieces in the cave.

subject: loot healing potions
fact: The party found two potions of healing in the cave.

subject: Zenvon persuasion roll
fact: Zenvon rolled a 16 on persuasion to persuade Sildar.

subject: Zenvon sleight of hand distraction
fact: Zenvon rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to distract wolves.

subject: Zenvon damage to first goblin
fact: Zenvon killed the first goblin with 9 points of damage.
source_quote: killing the first goblin with 9 points of damage

subject: Zenvon stealth roll
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin.

subject: Zenvon deception roll
fact: Zenvon used deception with a roll of 15 to imitate a goblin voice.

subject: Veyra saving throw
fact: Veyra failed her dexterity saving throw against the flood.
source_quote: Veyra failed her dexterity saving throw

subject: Zenvon saving throw
fact: Zenvon passed the DC 11 strength saving throw against the wolf's attack.
source_quote: passed the DC 11 strength saving throw

subject: Veyra sleight of hand rescue
fact: Zenvon rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to grab Veyra.
source_quote: Rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to grab Veyra

subject: Lionshield Coster reward value
fact: The reward for escorting Sildar to Neverwinter or Phandalin is 50 gold pieces.

subject: rest duration
fact: The party plans to take a long rest in Phandalin.
source_quote: Take a long rest in Phandalin
